name: Fenestra at The Square
neighborhood: Rockville Town Square, Rockville, MD (near Pike & Rose / North Bethesda)
buildingNotes: Three mid-rise buildings (6 stories each), approximately 497-500 total units, built 2008, centrally managed rental community.
doormanNotes: Concierge desk confirmed in the main building; VeryApt lists '24-Hour Front Desk' as an amenity. Leasing office hours are M-F 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm. Residents note only one concierge desk serves all three buildings. Cannot confirm true 24h staffing from an authoritative official source.
has2BRNotes: Multiple 2BR configurations: 2BR/2BA (1,132-1,306 sq ft), 2BR+Den/2BA, 2BR+Loft/2BA, 2BR+Den/2BA+half-bath. 1BR+Den floor plans also available.
balconyNotes: Private balconies listed as an amenity across multiple sources.
inUnitLaundryNotes: Washer/dryer in unit confirmed across all major listing sources.
elevatorNotes: Elevators in each building; garage elevators with direct building access confirmed.
petFriendlyNotes: Dogs and cats allowed, up to 2 per apartment. One-time deposit $250; monthly rent $35/cat, $45/dog. Breed restrictions apply (includes Pit Bulls, German Shepherds, Huskies, and others).
gymNotes: Fitness center (including yoga studio) in each of the three buildings.
packageRoomNotes: Package receiving at concierge desk confirmed.
unitClimateNotes: Individually controlled heat and AC in each unit per VeryApt listing.
wellMaintainedNotes: Reviews are split. Multiple residents praise responsive maintenance and well-kept grounds; others note recurring issues (lobby doors breaking, garage door problems) and describe grounds in disrepair. Overall ApartmentRatings score ~7.6/10 (5 reviews on VeryApt). Property was built 2008 and the review picture is mixed enough to leave uncertain.
bathroomsNote: Standard 2BR units have 2 full baths. Den/loft variants also have 2 full baths; one den configuration adds a half-bath (2BR+Den/2BA/1HB).
approxRentRange: $2,461-$2,879/mo for standard 2BR/2BA (up to ~$4,279 for premium units); specific floor plans start at $2,576. Broader building range: $1,570-$4,279 across all unit types.
